screens.title: Admin Dashboard
screens.purpose: Show admin-level summary of assignments, returned items, evidence status, delta status and blocked publish actions.

screens.title: Admin Article Inventory
screens.purpose: Browse all article candidates and readiness records at Admin planning level.

screens.title: Assignment Control Panel
screens.purpose: Plan Admin assignment of new draft tasks or existing article edits to Editor.

screens.title: Editor Return Review Panel
screens.purpose: Review work sent back by Editor with notes, reference status, attribution status and layout status.

screens.title: Evidence Review Panel
screens.purpose: Review Admin approval evidence, source status, image credit status, layout status and editorial notes.

screens.title: Delta Review Panel
screens.purpose: Plan before/after file delta review before any later controlled static apply path.

screens.title: Return for Correction Panel
screens.purpose: Plan Admin return of item to Editor with structured correction notes.

screens.title: Archive Panel
screens.purpose: Plan Admin archive decision for unsuitable or deferred candidates.

screens.title: Publish Decision Panel
screens.purpose: Plan Admin publish and publish-and-close decisions as blocked/non-executable actions until a later approved controlled publishing path.

screens.title: Tool Approval Panel
screens.purpose: Plan Admin approval of editor tool use for assigned articles, including images, graphs, tables, infographics and diagrams.

screens.title: Audit and Notes Panel
screens.purpose: Plan audit trail fields for Admin decisions, evidence notes, return notes and closure notes.

screens.title: Admin Status Summary Panel
screens.purpose: Show planned non-runtime status for assigned, returned, archived, internally cleared and blocked-for-publish items.

screens.title: Editor Dashboard
screens.purpose: Show planned editor-level overview of article inventory, unresolved AG25Z work and pending review states.

screens.title: Browse Admin-Assigned Articles
screens.purpose: Browse only articles/draft assignments sent by Admin to the Editor, filterable by category, type, readiness, reference, attribution and layout status.

screens.title: Prepare Admin-Assigned New Article Draft
screens.purpose: Prepare a new article draft only when Admin assigns a new article task to the Editor; no independent article creation is allowed.

screens.title: Edit Admin-Assigned Existing Article
screens.purpose: Edit only an existing article assigned by Admin; the Editor cannot browse or self-select unassigned repository articles.

screens.title: Assigned Article Structure Editor
screens.purpose: Edit structure, sections, reflection blocks and object anchors only within an Admin-assigned article workspace.

screens.title: Assigned Article Tool Browser
screens.purpose: Browse article preparation tools only inside an Admin-assigned article workspace; tools cannot be executed independently.

screens.title: Reference Manager
screens.purpose: Expose future manual fields for reference URL, source type, credibility, claim support and editorial verification status.

screens.title: Image/Object and Attribution Manager
screens.purpose: Expose future manual fields for image/object source, credit, licence note, generated-asset note and editorial verification status.

screens.title: Assigned Article Object Manager
screens.purpose: Plan graphs, tables, infographics, figures and diagrams only for the Admin-assigned article.

screens.title: SEO/Card/Summary Editor
screens.purpose: Plan fields for meta description, card title, summary, category badge and article preview text.

screens.title: Assigned Article Preview Panel
screens.purpose: Preview assigned article, card, mobile layout, references and objects before sending back to Admin.

screens.title: Send Back to Admin / Return with Notes / Hold Panel
screens.purpose: Send edited work back to Admin, return with editorial notes, or hold for clarification; Editor cannot publish.
